title: JobCraftAI
intent: Generate inclusive, high-converting job descriptions with hiring analytics
requirements: role-profiles module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
drafting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
bias-check module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
publishing module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
performance module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
iterations module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
